ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of data collection */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., West Branch, Iowa, United States) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the site was established */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the category */,
  "category_color" TEXT /* Color for visual representation in reports and dashboards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Surface PFP, Aircraft PFP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the data type */,
  "data_type_icon" TEXT /* Icon for visual representation in reports and dashboards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Discrete, Continuous) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "frequency_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the frequency */,
  "frequency_icon" TEXT /* Icon for visual representation in reports and dashboards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "year_start" INTEGER /* Start year of the data collection period */,
  "year_end" INTEGER /* End year of the data collection period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and operating system) of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
